P2.verbose: The scope of the variable 'thread_ID' can be reduced. Warning: Be careful when fixing this message, especially when there are inner loops. Here is an example where cppcheck will write that the scope for 'i' can be reduced:\012void f(int x)\012{\012    int i = 0;\012    if (x) {\012        // it's safe to move 'int i = 0;' here\012        for (int n = 0; n < 10; ++n) {\012            // it is possible but not safe to move 'int i = 0;' here\012            do_something(&i);\012        }\012    }\012}\012When you see this message it is always safe to reduce the variable scope 1 level.
